sentences.target: Die Rosen blühen heute im Garten.

translations.de: Die Rosen blühen heute im Garten.
translations.en: The roses are blooming in the garden today.
translations.es: Hoy las rosas están floreciendo en el jardín.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, les roses fleurissent dans le jardin.
translations.it: Oggi le rose stanno fiorendo in giardino.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天花园里的玫瑰正在盛开。
translations.pt: Hoje as rosas estão florescendo no jardim.
translations.vi: Hôm nay hoa hồng đang nở trong vườn.
translations.nl: Vandaag bloeien de rozen in de tuin.
translations.hu: Ma a kertben nyílnak a rózsák.
translations.hi: आज बगीचे में गुलाब खिल रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα στον κήπο ανθίζουν τα τριαντάφυλλα.
translations.nb: I dag blomstrer rosene i hagen.
translations.id: Hari ini mawar sedang mekar di taman.
translations.sv: I dag blommar rosorna i trädgården.
translations.da: I dag blomstrer roserne i haven.
translations.ja: 今日は庭でバラが咲いている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the noun 'Rosen' as definite; nominative plural subject of the clause.
Common noun, plural; head of the subject NP in nominative plural, agreeing with the finite verb.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person plural; intransitive, agrees with 'Rosen'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase, indicating the time of the event.
Preposition contracted with the article ('in dem'); introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'im' in dative, marking location.

translations.en: My houseplants are finally blooming again.
translations.es: Mis plantas de interior por fin vuelven a florecer.
translations.it: Le mie piante da appartamento finalmente tornano a fiorire.
translations.ko: 실내 식물들이 드디어 다시 꽃을 피우고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的室内植物终于又开花了。
translations.yue: 我屋企嘅室內植物終於又開花。
translations.ru: Мои комнатные растения наконец снова зацвели.
translations.pt: Minhas plantas de casa finalmente voltaram a florescer.
translations.he: העציצים שלי סוף סוף פורחים שוב.
translations.tr: Evdeki saksı bitkilerim sonunda yeniden çiçek açıyor.
translations.vi: Cây trong nhà của tôi cuối cùng भी नở hoa trở lại.
translations.ar: نباتاتي المنزلية أخيرًا تزهر من جديد.
translations.uk: Мої кімнатні рослини нарешті знову квітнуть.
translations.hi: मेरे घर के पौधे आखिरकार फिर से खिल रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Moje rośliny doniczkowe wreszcie znów kwitną.
translations.el: Τα φυτά εσωτερικού χώρου μου επιτέλους ξαναανθίζουν.
translations.id: Tanaman hias di rumahku akhirnya berbunga lagi.
translations.ro: Plantele mele de interior înfloresc în sfârșit din nou.
translations.cs: Moje pokojové rostliny konečně zase kvetou.
translations.ja: うちの観葉植物がようやくまた咲いている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Zimmerpflanzen'; nominative plural, 1st person singular possessor.
Compound common noun (Zimmer+Pflanze), plural; head of the subject NP in nominative plural.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person plural; intransitive, agrees with 'Zimmerpflanzen'.
Modal/temporal adverb expressing culmination or relief; modifies the predicate.
Adverb indicating repetition/resumption; modifies the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Da blühen die Bäume in der Allee.
sentences.reading: /daː ˈblyːən diː ˈbɔʏmə ɪn deːɐ̯ aˈleː/

translations.de: Da blühen die Bäume in der Allee.
translations.ipa: /daː ˈblyːən diː ˈbɔʏmə ɪn deːɐ̯ aˈleː/
translations.en: The trees are blooming there in the avenue.
translations.es: Los árboles están floreciendo allí en la avenida.
translations.fr: Les arbres fleurissent là-bas sur l’avenue.
translations.it: Gli alberi stanno fiorendo laggiù lungo il viale.
translations.ko: 저쪽 대로의 나무들이 꽃이 피고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那边林荫道上的树正在开花。
translations.yue: 嗰邊林蔭大道啲樹開緊花。
translations.pt: As árvores estão florescendo lá na avenida.
translations.vi: Cây trên đại lộ kia đang nở hoa.
translations.nl: Daar, op de laan, bloeien de bomen.
translations.hu: Ott, a sétányon, a fák virágoznak.
translations.hi: वहाँ उस एवेन्यू में पेड़ खिल रहे हैं.
translations.el: Εκεί, στη λεωφόρο, ανθίζουν τα δέντρα.
translations.nb: Der borte på alléen blomstrer trærne.
translations.id: Di sana di jalan itu, pohon-pohon sedang berbunga.
translations.ja: あそこの並木道で木々が咲いている。

tokens.explanation: Deictic/locative adverb in clause-initial position; sets a topical location (triggers V2 with the finite verb following).
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person plural; verb-second position after the initial adverb.
Definite article for 'Bäume'; nominative plural subject following the verb.
Common noun, plural; head of the subject NP in nominative plural.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; with static location, it governs dative case.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; marks 'Allee' as the object of 'in'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'in' in dative, indicating location.

sentences.target: Im Frühling blühen die Kirschbäume überall.

translations.de: Im Frühling blühen die Kirschbäume überall.
translations.en: In spring, the cherry trees bloom everywhere.
translations.es: En primavera, los cerezos florecen por todas partes.
translations.fr: Au printemps, les cerisiers fleurissent partout.
translations.it: In primavera, i ciliegi fioriscono ovunque.
translations.zh-Hans: 春天樱花树在各处开花。
translations.yue: 春天櫻花樹喺到處都開花。
translations.pt: Na primavera, as cerejeiras florescem por toda parte.
translations.he: באביב עצי הדובדבן פורחים בכל מקום.
translations.tr: İlkbaharda kiraz ağaçları her yerde çiçek açar.
translations.vi: Vào mùa xuân, cây anh đào nở khắp nơi.
translations.ar: في الربيع، أشجار الكرز تزهر في كل مكان.
translations.nl: In het voorjaar bloeien de kersenbomen overal.
translations.hi: वसंत में चेरी के पेड़ हर जगह खिलते हैं.
translations.el: Την άνοιξη οι κερασιές ανθίζουν παντού.
translations.id: Saat musim semi, pohon sakura mekar di mana-mana.
translations.ja: 春になると桜の木があちこちで咲く。

tokens.explanation: Preposition contracted with the article ('in dem'); introduces a temporal PP and governs dative.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'Im' in dative, marking time.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person plural; verb-second after the initial PP.
Definite article for 'Kirschbäume'; nominative plural subject.
Compound common noun (Kirsche+Baum), plural; head of the subject NP in nominative plural.
Spatial adverb indicating ubiquitous distribution; modifies the predicate.

Mis plantas de interior por fin vuelven a florecer.
